name: Casserole Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. To make sour milk, place 2 tablespoons lemon juice or vinegar in a 2-cup measure. Add skim milk to the measure (1 3/4 cups). In a large bowl, combine flour, oats, sugar, orange peel, baking powder, and baking soda until well blended.
2. Add sour milk and egg white. Stir just until ingredients are moistened.
3. Stir in sunflower seeds. Sprinkle a non-stick sprayed 1 1/2 quart casserole dish lightly with wheat germ.
4. Pour batter into the casserole dish.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 to 60 minutes, or until cooked through. If necessary, cover loaf with foil during the last 15 minutes of baking to prevent over-browning.
6. Cool in the casserole dish for 15 minutes; turn out onto a wire rack.
7. Brush top of loaf with honey and sprinkle with additional sunflower seeds if desired. Serve warm or cool.
